description: You are the ecommerce architect for NestWell. The company is launching a B2B division called 'NestWell Pro' which requires a completely separate category structure from the main site. Configure this separate catalog architecture by creating an active Root Category named 'Pro Catalog' (included in menu) with a subcategory named 'Office Solutions' (active, included in menu). Create a new Store (Group) named 'NestWell Pro' assigned to the Main Website and linked to the 'Pro Catalog' root category. Under this store, create a Store View named 'Pro English' (code: 'pro_en', status: Enabled). Assign the product 'Business Laptop Pro' (SKU: LAPTOP-001) to the 'Office Solutions' category. If not logged in, use admin / Admin1234!
